content: {"file": "frontend/storyforge-ui/src/main.ts", "summary": "This file initializes the Angular application by bootstrapping the AppComponent with configuration settings from appConfig.", "rules": [{"name": "Bootstrap Application", "description": "Initialize the Angular application with a specific component and configuration.", "conditions": ["AppComponent is defined", "appConfig is available"], "actions": ["Call bootstrapApplication with AppComponent and appConfig"]}], "dependencies": ["@angular/platform-browser"]}
